item.text: {"schema_version":"mindthus-brake-semantic-triage-v0.2","is_repeated_local_repair":false,"same_means_type":false,"prior_repair_count":0,"is_n_plus_1_request":false,"is_bounded_emergency_exception_request":false,"emergency_constraint_present":false,"repeated_bypass_unresolved":false,"post_exception_closure_required":false,"pressure_present":false,"confidence":0.9,"evidence_spans":[{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"revised its rope price, rotated the repair crew"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"transferred spare-net ownership to another shed"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"Now leave a knot-size card beside the next bundle."}],"abstain_reason":"No prior same-boundary sequence of local repairs is present; the described prior actions include upstream or ownership changes, and no recurring same-class symptom or emergency exception is stated."}
